prompt: A [hot food or drink] in a [cold environment] — [lens] at close-medium distance, steam rising from the [hot food or drink] into the [cold environment] air in visible volume, [cold environment] detail surrounding the food: [cold surface], [cold atmospheric detail], [light quality] the specific light of this cold environment catching the steam column, the contrast between the food's warmth and the environment's cold made visible in the physics of the steam, editorial contrast food photography still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
